Interface IRasterFunctionArguments

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control raster function arguments.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("04AA081E-28B0-47E4-B375-F367046DA924")]
public interface IRasterFunctionArguments

The list of all files associated with the arguments.
